coreIssue: As a Senior Acting Coach, Taya appears to be facing challenges with last-minute workshop planning, which could stem from unclear priorities or a mismanaged workload. This 1:1 aims to explore whether her current planning process is a result of external pressures, capacity issues, or simply a lack of clarity in her role and expectations. Understanding these factors will help determine what support is necessary for more proactive and effective workshop execution.
openingQuestion: Taya, can you walk me through how you currently plan your workshops and any challenges that might be affecting your lead time?
listenFor: whether she feels overwhelmed by her current workload
if they believe additional resources could improve planning
whether unclear role expectations contribute to last-minute planning
avoid: do not assume last-minute planning is due to lack of effort
do not suggest solutions before understanding her perspective
goodOutcome: You will understand the root cause of last-minute workshop planning and identify if Taya needs additional support or resources.
suggestedAction: Clarify and agree on a structured planning process that allows for more lead time and reduces last-minute stress.
